short_description: General rich broth with brain and heart infusions, peptone, glucose, and phosphate buffer.
typical_use: Cultivation of fastidious pathogenic microorganisms including yeasts and molds; examination of water, wastewater, meat, and foods.
bulk_components_summary: calf brain infusion; beef heart infusion; peptone

short_description: Dehydrated blood agar base containing peptone, liver extract, yeast extract, salt, and agar.
typical_use: Base for enriched blood agar plates and haemolysis readout.
bulk_components_summary: peptone; liver extract; yeast extract; agar

short_description: Blood Agar Base N° 2 after addition of 5-7% sterile defibrinated sheep or horse blood.
typical_use: Isolation and cultivation of fastidious and non-fastidious microorganisms and determination of haemolytic properties.
bulk_components_summary: peptone; liver extract; yeast extract; agar; defibrinated sheep or horse blood

short_description: Fluid thioglycollate broth with casein peptone, yeast extract, dextrose, thioglycollate, cystine, indicator, and low agar.
typical_use: General-purpose liquid medium for cultivation of aerobes and anaerobes and sterility testing.

short_description: Classic LB broth with tryptone, NaCl, and yeast extract.
typical_use: General growth medium; CCAP recipe adapted from Bertani 1951.
source_reference_raw: Bertani, G (1951) Studies on lysogenesis... adapted for CCAP

short_description: LB broth recipe with added bacteriological agar.
source_reference_raw: Bertani, G (1951) Studies on lysogenesis... adapted for CCAP

short_description: Defined phosphate-ammonium-salt stock used as the basis for final M9 formulations.
typical_use: Intermediate stock solution for preparing M9 broth or agar.
source_reference_raw: Molecular Cloning, A Laboratory Manual 1st ed. Maniatis. 1982. p.68.

short_description: Defined minimal broth assembled from water, M9 salts stock, MgSO4, CaCl2, and glucose stock.
source_reference_raw: Molecular Cloning, A Laboratory Manual 1st ed. Maniatis. 1982. p.68.

short_description: M9 broth recipe prepared with agar.
typical_use: Minimal solid medium; PDF notes CaCl2 should not be added for Pseudomonas.
source_reference_raw: Molecular Cloning, A Laboratory Manual 1st ed. Maniatis. 1982. p.68.

short_description: Selective differential agar with multiple peptones, bile salts, lactose, neutral red, crystal violet, and agar.
typical_use: Selective and differential isolation of gram-negative bacilli on the basis of lactose fermentation.
bulk_components_summary: gelatin peptone; meat peptone; bile salts; casein peptone; agar

short_description: Reinforced clostridial medium with meat extract, peptone, glucose, yeast extract, starch, acetate, cysteine, and low agar.
typical_use: Cultivation and enumeration of clostridia and other anaerobes as well as facultative microorganisms.
bulk_components_summary: meat extract; peptone; yeast extract; starch; agar
source_reference_raw: 27546 Clostridial Nutrient Medium (Reinforced Clostridial Medium; RCM)

short_description: Rich soy-casein digest broth with glucose and phosphate buffer.
typical_use: Luxuriant growth of many fastidious organisms; confirmation of Campylobacter jejuni by motility test.
